'''rothapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nucicultural|nucicultural]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-th-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nucicultural|nucicultural]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rothapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rothapithi|rothapithi]] || [[word:rothapiji|rothapiji]] || [[word:rothapishi|rothapishi]] || [[word:rothapiki|rothapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rothaputhuthu|rothaputhuthu]] || [[word:rothapujuju|rothapujuju]] || [[word:rothapushushu|rothapushushu]] || [[word:rothapukuku|rothapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rothaputhu|rothaputhu]] || [[word:rothapuju|rothapuju]] || [[word:rothapushu|rothapushu]] || [[word:rothapuku|rothapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rothapufthuf|rothapufthuf]] || [[word:rothapufjuf|rothapufjuf]] || [[word:rothapufshuf|rothapufshuf]] || [[word:rothapufkuf|rothapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rothapethe|rothapethe]] || [[word:rothapeje|rothapeje]] || [[word:rothapeshe|rothapeshe]] || [[word:rothapeke|rothapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rothapothotho|rothapothotho]] || [[word:rothapojojo|rothapojojo]] || [[word:rothaposhosho|rothaposhosho]] || [[word:rothapokoko|rothapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rothapotho|rothapotho]] || [[word:rothapojo|rothapojo]] || [[word:rothaposho|rothaposho]] || [[word:rothapoko|rothapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rothapofthof|rothapofthof]] || [[word:rothapofjof|rothapofjof]] || [[word:rothapofshof|rothapofshof]] || [[word:rothapofkof|rothapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rothapïfthïf|rothapïfthïf]] || [[word:rothapïfjïf|rothapïfjïf]] || [[word:rothapïfshïf|rothapïfshïf]] || [[word:rothapïfkïf|rothapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rothapïfthïfthïf|rothapïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:rothapïfjïfjïf|rothapïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:rothapïfshïfshïf|rothapïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:rothapïfkïfkïf|rothapïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rothapïfthïf|rothapïfthïf]] || [[word:rothapïfjïf|rothapïfjïf]] || [[word:rothapïfshïf|rothapïfshïf]] || [[word:rothapïfkïf|rothapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rothapïfthïf|rothapïfthïf]] || [[word:rothapïfjïf|rothapïfjïf]] || [[word:rothapïfshïf|rothapïfshïf]] || [[word:rothapïfkïf|rothapïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rothapæthæ|rothapæthæ]] || [[word:rothapæjæ|rothapæjæ]] || [[word:rothapæshæ|rothapæshæ]] || [[word:rothapækæ|rothapækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rothapathatha|rothapathatha]] || [[word:rothapajaja|rothapajaja]] || [[word:rothapashasha|rothapashasha]] || [[word:rothapakaka|rothapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rothapatha|rothapatha]] || [[word:rothapaja|rothapaja]] || [[word:rothapasha|rothapasha]] || [[word:rothapaka|rothapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rothapafthaf|rothapafthaf]] || [[word:rothapafjaf|rothapafjaf]] || [[word:rothapafshaf|rothapafshaf]] || [[word:rothapafkaf|rothapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rothapasha|rothapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rothapshësha|rothapshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rothaprosha|rothaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rothapmusha|rothapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rothapyasha|rothapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorothapnkshësha|gorothapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorothapnkrosha|gorothapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorothapnkmusha|gorothapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorothapnkyasha|gorothapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rothathapasha|rothathapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rothathapshësha|rothathapshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rothathaprosha|rothathaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rothathapmusha|rothathapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rothathapyasha|rothathapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorothathapnkshësha|gorothathapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorothathapnkrosha|gorothathapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorothathapnkmusha|gorothathapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorothathapnkyasha|gorothathapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:rethæpasha|rethæpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rethæpshësha|rethæpshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rethæprosha|rethæprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rethæpmusha|rethæpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rethæpyasha|rethæpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorethæpnkshësha|gorethæpnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorethæpnkrosha|gorethæpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorethæpnkmusha|gorethæpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorethæpnkyasha|gorethæpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rothfapasha|rothfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rothfapshësha|rothfapshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rothfaprosha|rothfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rothfapmusha|rothfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rothfapyasha|rothfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorothfapnkshësha|gorothfapnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorothfapnkrosha|gorothfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorothfapnkmusha|gorothfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorothfapnkyasha|gorothfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
